assumptions: Front slot is centered on the front face of the base plate.
Top riser is centered on the base plate along the length.
Top slot is centered on the top face of the riser and runs the full length of the riser.
No fillets or chamfers are specified.
code:
import cadquery as cq

# Parameters
base_length = PARAMETERS['base_length']
base_width = PARAMETERS['base_width']
base_height = PARAMETERS['base_height']
riser_height = PARAMETERS['riser_height']
riser_width = PARAMETERS['riser_width']
front_slot_width = PARAMETERS['front_slot_width']
front_slot_depth = PARAMETERS['front_slot_depth']
top_slot_width = PARAMETERS['top_slot_width']
top_slot_depth = PARAMETERS['top_slot_depth']

# Base plate
base_plate = cq.Workplane("XY").box(base_length, base_width, base_height)

# Top riser (centered on base along length, flush with back? Assume centered)
# Place riser on top of base, centered along length and width? 
# Actually, typical: riser sits on base, centered along length, flush with back? 
# Assume centered along length and width for simplicity.
riser = cq.Workplane("XY").workplane(offset=base_height).box(base_length, riser_width, riser_height)
# Center riser on base
riser = riser.translate((0, (base_width - riser_width)/2, 0))
top_riser = base_plate.union(riser)

# Front slot: cut on front face (Y positive direction? Assume front is Y+)
# Slot centered on front face, width along X, depth along Y
front_slot = cq.Workplane("XY").workplane(offset=base_height/2).box(front_slot_width, front_slot_depth, base_height)
front_slot = front_slot.translate((0, base_width/2, 0))
result = top_riser.cut(front_slot)

# Top U-slot: longitudinal slot on top of riser, centered, full length
# Slot width along X, depth along Z, length along Y? Actually length along X (since riser length is along X)
# Assume slot runs full length of riser (base_length) along X, centered on top face
# Create slot as a box and cut
slot = cq.Workplane("XY").workplane(offset=base_height + riser_height).box(base_length, top_slot_width, top_slot_depth)
slot = slot.translate((0, (base_width - riser_width)/2 + riser_width/2, -top_slot_depth/2))
result = result.cut(slot)

# Final result
result = result

feature_summary.description: Rectangular cutout on front face of base plate, 20 mm wide, 10 mm deep
feature_summary.name: Front Rectangular Slot

feature_summary.description: Rectangular block 60x20x20 mm sitting on base plate
feature_summary.name: Top Riser Block

feature_summary.description: Longitudinal U-shaped slot on top of riser, 10 mm wide, 15 mm deep
feature_summary.name: Top U-Channel Slot
